modules.title: Current Conditions

content: Low heat stress today, don't forget water and shade.

summerMessages: Safe to be outdoors, but don't forget fresh water and shady spots.
Mild temps, but pets still need shade and good airflow.
Low heat stress today, don't forget water and shade.
Don't risk heat stress. Never leave pets in cars.
winterMessages: Low heat stress today, pets still need water and shade.
Leaving pets in cars, even briefly, is dangerous

itemProps.title: Heat Stress

summerMessages: Leash up! Footpath is paw-fect temp.

content: Walk when it's cool. Morn & eve!
itemProps.title: Pawfect Time to Walk

sponsor.text: Here to help you feel your best

uvMessage: Protect if outside for extended periods. Even on cloudy days

danger.text: To prevent wildfire, follow safety guidelines at [checkitsalright.nz](https://www.checkitsalright.nz)

season.text: Other than public conservation land, permits are not required today.

values.text: Any outbreak of fire is extremely serious! All fires are potentially serious and will easily become uncontrollable, unpredictable and fast moving. These fires are very difficult to fight and may become very dangerous and often last for several days.

Outbreak of fire is very serious! Fires will start easily and will spread rapidly and burn intensely right after ignition. Small fires can quickly become large fires and show extreme fire behaviour. These fires can be difficult to control and will often become much larger and longer-lasting fires.
Outbreak of fire is serious! Fires can start easily and control becomes increasingly more difficult the longer the fire is left.
Control of fires is reasonably easy. Fires are not likely to become serious and are often easy to control if attended to quickly.
Wildfires are unlikely. Ignition may take place near large and prolonged heat sources but the resulting fires generally do not spread much. Control of fires is generally easy.

fireWeatherInfo.docDisclaimer: All fires are restricted on Department of Conservation land. Check if you need a permit at [FENZ](https://www.checkitsalright.nz/)

values.text: Fires may be lit in open air, without restriction.
Lighting a fire is riskier than usual. A fire permit is required for most fire types
Lighting fires in the open air is not permitted. Existing fire permits are suspended, though fire permits may still be granted in exceptional circumstances.

forecasts.statement: Partly cloudy with a few showers. Southwesterlies.

information.text: High: Forecast for the calendar day. Usually occurs in the afternoon.
Low: Forecast between noon on the calendar day and noon the following day.  Usually occurs around dawn.
Forecast times: Overnight: Midnight - 6am, Morning: 6am - Noon, Afternoon: Noon - 6pm, Evening: 6pm - Midnight.

labels: Avg wind speed (not gusts) in km/h
modules.name: forty-eight-hour-forecast/1

notes.text: Total rainfall so far today: 0.2 mm. Total rainfall forecast for today: 0.2 mm

notesLast.text: The hourly model data shown can differ from the written forecast and icons, which are produced by MetService meteorologists and take into account model data along with many other data sources. If they differ significantly, please use the text forecasts.

Forecast data is specifically generated for Napier City (93371). Rainfall shown is for the sum up to the hour. Wind speed, wind direction and temperature are the observed or forecast values at the given hour.

modules.title: Hourly Observations and Forecast

tabs.description: Rank of the locations with the highest air temperature recorded yesterday. Prev is the previous day's rank for the location. The arrow shows if the current rank is higher or lower than that for the previous day. Max of 5 locations plus current town/city shown.
tabs.name: Hottest

tabs.description: Rank of the locations with the lowest air temperature recorded yesterday. Prev is the previous day's rank for the location. The arrow shows if the current rank is higher or lower than that for the previous day. Max of 5 locations plus current town/city shown
tabs.name: Coldest

tabs.description: Rank of the locations with the most rainfall recorded yesterday. Prev is the previous day's rank for the location. The arrow shows if the current rank is higher or lower than that for the previous day. Max of 5 locations plus current town/city shown.
tabs.name: Wettest

tabs.description: Rank of the locations with the strongest wind gust recorded yesterday. Prev is the previous day's rank for the location. The arrow shows if the current rank is higher or lower than that for the previous day. Max of 5 locations plus current town/city shown.
tabs.name: Windiest

modules.content:
Quiet weather returns, and is here to stay
Issued: 12:05pm Mon, 11 May
• Large area of high pressure pushing onto the country, bringing settled weather into next week.
• Rain for Auckland and parts of Northland and the Coromandel Peninsula later Monday and into Tuesday.
• Cooler mornings return, with fine weather for ...
